welcome_subtitle: Claim Your Stake in the Most Viral Memecoin on Base!
step_1_desc: Securely connect your wallet to verify eligibility for the Base Pepe airdrop.
step_2_desc: Our system will check your wallet for eligible tokens and trading activity on Base.

about_desc: Pepe on Base is the ultimate community-driven memecoin, bringing the legendary frog to the fastest-growing L2. We're here to dominate the meme culture and reward our loyal holders.
a1: The Pepe Airdrop is a community reward program for active users and holders on the Base network.
a2: Simply connect your wallet, verify your eligibility, and follow the instructions to claim.
